name: studio.create_page
description: Add a new page to an Actium Studio site. Page is created as a draft by default; publish via studio.publish_page.
whenToUse: Operator needs a net-new page on an existing site (e.g. '/pricing', '/about').
Post-scaffold flow where studio.scaffold_site produced a landing page and the operator wants to add sub-pages.
Template-driven expansion: create the shell of a page the operator will populate in a follow-up update_page call.
whenNotToUse: A page with the target slug already exists — call studio.get_page first; use studio.update_page to edit it.
Caller wants the end-to-end site experience from a brief — use studio.scaffold_site instead; create_page is explicit-only.
Caller wants a blog post — posts and pages are separate surfaces; use studio.create_post.
